synopsis: The post is largely accurate: Corey Durell Ruiz, 36, was fatally shot by a Madison, WI police officer on July 22, 2026, and police say he produced a knife and injured an officer during a struggle, while witness videos and bystanders questioned whether deadly force was necessary. The Wisconsin DOJ is investigating and the officers were placed on leave. The main flaw is the post's reference to body-camera footage, which does not exist because Madison officers do not wear body cameras.
